title: Essential Dark Pack
description: This mod changes all the Minecraft UI to look like the Essentials UI
body:
## *DISCLAIMER*

I AM NOT ASSOCIATED WITH THE ESSENTIAL MINECRAFT MOD AND THIS IS ALL FOR FUN IF YOU WANT TO CHECK THEM OUT GO TO [https://essential.gg/](https://essential.gg/)

![Essential Dark Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b22cc67403bb2c6d41d3dc26d3d8f223ff47bf16.png)

This resource pack is a very straightforward yet effective UI mod change all around minecraft to look more like the Essentials UI and has a good dark mode! This is my first resource pack so i would appreciate if you shared it!
